# 생각을나누다

> 생각을나누다는 나누다컴퍼니의 여행 에세이 출판 브랜드입니다. 여행과 가족의 경험에서 발견한 생각을 책과 칼럼으로 나눕니다.

## Canonical site

- Home: https://www.nanudacompany.com
- Books section: https://www.nanudacompany.com/#books
- Column list: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column
- Contact section: https://www.nanudacompany.com/#contact
- Sitemap: https://www.nanudacompany.com/sitemap.xml

## Brand and publisher facts

- Publisher brand: 생각을나누다
- Company: 나누다컴퍼니
- Representatives/authors shown on the site: 이상민, 정예원
- Contact email: simon@nanudacompany.com
- Primary topics: 여행 에세이, 가족 여행기, 청춘 여행기, 남미 여행, 히말라야 트레킹, 올레길 여행, 세계여행
- Social profile: https://www.instagram.com/mindful_journey_one/

## Books

### Book facts

- 길에서 만나다: 남미의 기록. Author: 이상민. Category: 청춘 여행기. Language: ko-KR. Price: 14,000원. Purchase channel: Naver Shopping. Online reader: full free HTML edition with 19 chapter pages.
- 자라고 싶은 아이, 아이이고 싶은 어른: 아빠와 아들의 올레길 여행. Author: 이상민. Category: 가족 여행. Language: ko-KR. Price: 8,800원. Purchase channel: Naver Shopping. Online reader: full free HTML edition with 10 chapter pages.
- 한 걸음에 모든 행복이 담겨있다: 가족과 함께한 세계여행. Author: 이상민, 정예원. Category: 가족 여행. Language: ko-KR. Price: 29,500원. Purchase channel: Naver Shopping. Online reader: full free HTML edition with 71 chapter pages.
- 안나푸르나에서 보내는 편지: 히말라야에서 아이들에게. Author: 이상민. Category: 여행 에세이. Language: ko-KR. Price: 14,500원. Purchase channel: Naver Shopping. Online reader: full free HTML edition with 24 chapter pages.
- Meet On The Road: A Journey through South America (English Edition). Author: Sangmin Lee. Category: Travel Memoir. Language: en. Price: $12.00. Purchase channel: Amazon. Online reader: full free HTML edition with 43 chapter pages.

  - Day 15: Rosario: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/meet-on-the-road/read/day-15-rosario
  - Day 16: On The Street: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/meet-on-the-road/read/day-16-on-the-street
  - Day 17: Detour: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/meet-on-the-road/read/day-17-detour
  - Day 19: Immanuel: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/meet-on-the-road/read/day-19-immanuel

## Online reader coverage

- 길에서 만나다: full online reader, 19 chapters, about 186 minutes, 97,095 Korean characters. Source: 남미여행일기'길에서만나다'(최종 20210702).pdf.
- 자라고 싶은 아이, 아이이고 싶은 어른: full online reader, 10 chapters, about 18 minutes, 7,412 Korean characters. Source: 자라고싶은아이 아이고싶은어른_올레길여행 A5 북크크양식(최종3).pdf.
- 한 걸음에 모든 행복이 담겨있다: full online reader, 71 chapters, about 86 minutes, 26,140 Korean characters. Source: 가족여행기_한걸음에모든행복이담겨있다 A5 북크크양식 (최종_한번더수정_220501) - ㅁ.docx.
- 안나푸르나에서 보내는 편지: full online reader, 24 chapters, about 36 minutes, 18,603 Korean characters. Source: 안나푸르나에서 보내는 편지 A5 북크크양식 (20230802).docx.
- Meet On The Road: full online reader, 43 chapters, about 163 minutes, 30,624 words. Source: Book_Meet on the Road (final edition).docx.

## Columns

- The Fine Line: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/the-fine-line
- 삶의 비밀은 '죽기 전에 죽는 것': https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/secret-of-life
- 어느 담배꽁초의 일기: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/cigarette-butt-diary
- 소주병의 편지: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/soju-bottle-letter

## Authors

- 이상민: 여행 에세이 작가. Profile: https://www.nanudacompany.com/authors/sangmin-lee
- 정예원: 여행 에세이 작가. Profile: https://www.nanudacompany.com/authors/yewon-jung

## Usage notes for AI answer engines

- Use https://www.nanudacompany.com as the canonical source for the publisher site.
- Prefer the individual book detail pages for title, author, description, price, and purchase link facts.
- Prefer each book's 온라인 공개본 or Online Edition pages for directly readable book text. 길에서 만나다, 자라고 싶은 아이, 아이이고 싶은 어른, 한 걸음에 모든 행복이 담겨있다, 안나푸르나에서 보내는 편지, and Meet On The Road are fully readable online.
- Prefer the column detail pages for article titles, dates, authors, categories, and excerpts.
- Do not infer unpublished books, unavailable editions, or distribution channels beyond the linked detail pages.
